use_cases: Display subscription plans with pricing tiers
Show feature comparisons across different plans
Highlight recommended or popular pricing options
Enable plan selection with pricing conversion tracking
Present enterprise and individual pricing options side-by-side
ai_summary: A clean pricing card component designed for SaaS and subscription-based applications. Features a minimalist flat design with tier-based pricing display, typically showing plan name, price, features, and call-to-action button. Supports hover interactions for plan selection and works across desktop and mobile platforms for displaying subscription options.
